MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2020 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, OCT-22-2020 HEARING HELD RE: PETITIONER MARTIN QUINN'S PETITION FOR ORDER RELIEVING PETITIONER-CLAIMANT FROM PROVISIONS OF GOV. CODE 945.4 AFTER DENIAL BY ENTITY OF APPLICATION TO FILE A LATE CLAIM AND TO ALLOW LATE CLAIM. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MARTIN QUINN'S PETITION FOR RELIEF FROM THE GOVERNMENT CLAIMS STATUTES PER GOV'T CODE SEC. 946.6 IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR COMPLETE RULING.) JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Regarding Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner-Claimant From Provisions Of Gov. Code 945.4 After Denial By Entity Of Application To File A Late Claim And To Allow Late Claim
Off Calendar Oct-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE)
Atty. BENNETT M. COHEN, Esq. of the Law Office Of Bennett M. Cohen, PC (Tel: 415-864-3246) for petitioner Martin Quinn;
Atty. NATASSIA KWAN, Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-4272) for respondent City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER MARTIN QUINN's Petition For Order Relieving Petitioner-Claimant From Provisions Of Gov. Code 945.4 After Denial By Entity Of Application To File A Late Claim And To Allow Late Claim.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petitioner Martin Quinn's petition for relief from the government claims statutes per Gov't Code sec. 946.6 is denied. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
